code: import axios from'axios';const api=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5000'});api.interceptors.request.use(cfg=>{const t=localStorage.getItem('mh_token');if(t)cfg.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(t);return cfg;});api.interceptors.response.use(r=>r,err=>{var _err$response;if(((_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:_err$response.status)===401){localStorage.removeItem('mh_token');localStorage.removeItem('mh_user');window.location.href='/login';}return Promise.reject(err);});export default api;
